message:
Fix musl static linking by setting RUSTFLAGS explicitly

The cargo config.toml rustflags weren't being picked up in GitHub Actions.
Explicitly setting RUSTFLAGS env var ensures the binary is statically linked.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -72,6 +72,8 @@ jobs:
 
       - name: Build release binary (native)
         if: "!matrix.use_cross"
+        env:
+          RUSTFLAGS: "-C target-feature=+crt-static"
         run: |
           cargo build --release -p pt-core --target ${{ matrix.target }}
